title: A New Transfer Learning-Based Traffic Classification Algorithm for a Multi-Domain SDN Network
contribution: Proposed a novel transfer learning-based approach for traffic classification in multi-domain SDN networks, achieving high accuracy across diverse network environments.
authors: Nam-Thang Hoang, Cong-Son Duong, Ngoc-Minh Vu, Huy-Hieu Nguyen, Van Tong, X.Truong Tran, Hai Anh Tran
abstract: A New Transfer Learning-Based Traffic Classification Algorithm for a Multi-Domain SDN Network presented at the 12th International Symposium on Information and Communication Technology (SOICT 2023).

title: Efficient Federated Learning Convergence with Epoch Adaptation
contribution: Introduced an epoch adaptation mechanism for federated learning that improves convergence efficiency, addressing straggler effects and non-IID data challenges.
authors: Huy-Hieu Nguyen, Nam-Thang Hoang, Hai-Anh Tran, Tulika Mandal, Ruthvik Annareddy, Prithvi Choudhary, Truong Tran
abstract: Efficient Federated Learning Convergence with Epoch Adaptation presented at IEEE 26th International Conference on Information Reuse and Integration for Data Science.

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach to Python Library Fuzzing with GRPO
contribution: Applied deep reinforcement learning with GRPO for automated Python library fuzzing, improving bug detection efficiency.
authors: Viet-Anh Le-Minh, Hai-Anh Tran, Huy-Hieu Nguyen, Nam-Thang Hoang, Truong Tran
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach to Python Library Fuzzing with GRPO presented at IEEE 26th International Conference on Information Reuse and Integration for Data Science.

title: MTMLD-AWSR: A Novel Multi-Teacher Multi-Level Distillation Approach for Class Incremental Learning in Edge-Cloud Systems
contribution: Developed a multi-teacher multi-level distillation approach for class incremental learning in edge-cloud systems, enabling efficient knowledge transfer.
authors: Phuong-Thao Nguyen, Hai-Anh Tran, Huy-Hieu Nguyen, Nam-Thang Hoang, Tulika Mandal, Ruthvik Annareddy, Prithvi Choudhary, Truong Tran
abstract: MTMLD-AWSR: A novel Multi-Teacher Multi-Level Distillation approach for Class Incremental Learning in Edge-Cloud systems presented at IEEE Cloud Summit 2025.
